themes: The backlog is heavily weighted toward Managers, signaling that frontline platform users are the primary drivers of product feedback and that day-to-day workflow efficiency, reporting usability, and time savings are the dominant pain point themes to investigate.

Wait times span from under two weeks to nearly a year, creating a significant trust and satisfaction risk—especially for long-tenured accounts with multiple contacts waiting (e.g., Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Ford, and Anytime Fitness), suggesting these relationships warrant urgent, prioritized outreach.

Several enterprise and multi-unit franchise brands appear multiple times across different contacts and wait periods, indicating that product questions may be spreading virally within accounts—making it critical to identify shared themes per account and respond with consolidated, account-level insights rather than one-off conversations.
